scenarios.name: Rail shows one button per configured provider

steps.text: "<count>" providers are configured
the rail has "<count>" provider buttons

scenarios.name: Rail is not visible when no providers are configured

steps.text: no providers are configured
the rail is not visible

scenarios.name: Rail is not visible when the panel is hidden

steps.text: the panel is hidden
the rail is not visible

scenarios.name: The active provider button is marked active

steps.text: providers "<first>" and "<second>" are configured in that order
the active provider is "<first>"
the provider button for "<first>" is active
the provider button for "<second>" is not active

scenarios.name: Clicking a provider button switches the active provider

steps.text: providers "<first>" and "<second>" are configured in that order
the active provider is "<first>"
the user clicks the provider button for "<second>"
the active provider is "<second>"

scenarios.name: Clicking a provider button navigates to that provider's URL

steps.text: providers "<first>" and "<second>" are configured in that order
the active provider is "<first>"
the user clicks the provider button for "<second>"
the web provider has navigated to the URL of provider "<second>"

scenarios.name: Clicking the already-active provider button does not navigate again

steps.text: providers "<first>" and "<second>" are configured in that order
the panel is showing the web view for provider "<first>"
the user clicks the provider button for "<first>"
the web provider navigation count for provider "<first>" is "1"

scenarios.name: Switching away from a provider via the rail and back does not reload it

steps.text: providers "<first>" and "<second>" are configured in that order
the panel is showing the web view for provider "<first>"
the user clicks the provider button for "<second>"
the user clicks the provider button for "<first>"
the web provider navigation count for provider "<first>" is "1"

scenarios.name: Rail collapses when the collapse control is clicked

steps.text: the rail is expanded
the user clicks the collapse control
the rail is collapsed
the provider buttons are not visible
the expand control is visible

scenarios.name: Rail expands when the expand control is clicked

steps.text: the rail is collapsed
the user clicks the expand control
the rail is expanded
the provider buttons are visible

scenarios.name: Rail collapse state persists across app restart

steps.text: the rail is "<state>"
the app is restarted
the rail is "<state>"

scenarios.name: Active provider button highlight follows Ctrl+Tab

steps.text: providers "Gemini" and "ChatGPT" are configured in that order
the active provider is "Gemini"
the user presses Ctrl+Tab
the active provider is "ChatGPT"
the provider button for "ChatGPT" is active
the provider button for "Gemini" is not active

scenarios.name: Ctrl+Tab cycles from the provider last activated by the rail

steps.text: providers "Gemini", "ChatGPT", and "Copilot" are configured in that order
the active provider is "Gemini"
the user clicks the provider button for "Copilot"
the user presses Ctrl+Tab
the active provider is "Gemini"

scenarios.name: Each provider button has the provider name as its accessibility label

steps.text: a provider with name "<name>" is configured
the provider button for "<name>" has accessibility label "<name>"

scenarios.name: Rail overlay sits on top of web content without shrinking the content area

steps.text: "1" providers are configured
the rail overlay is visible on the right edge of the panel
the web content area fills the panel window

scenarios.name: Provider buttons are vertically centered as a group on the rail

steps.text: "3" providers are configured
the provider buttons are vertically centered as a group on the right edge of the panel
